steps.title: Locate the figure
steps.content: The question asks for the location of the figure in New Day Coming. The relevant note says that painting depicts a woman in a white dress floating on the left side of the canvas. The answer must foreground that placement, not the artist's broader style.

steps.title: Reject other painting details
steps.content: Choice A focuses on the tranquil mood of Rawles's paintings. Choice C focuses on vivid blue water colors in two works. Choice D compares the size of New Day Coming with the size of Yesterday Called and Said We Were Together. None of those choices emphasizes where the figure appears.

steps.title: Choose the location statement
steps.content: Choice B states that in New Day Coming, a woman is depicted on the left side of the canvas. That directly matches the requested emphasis on the figure's location within the painting. The answer is B.
